operations.replace_with: **Deed [329] (PDF CONFIRMED 2026-03-31)**: Warranty Deed with Vendor's Lien, Genevieve B. Dorsett Family Trust (Donald J. Dorsett, Trustee) → Cynthia S. Tiblier and husband Bruce V. Tiblier (Navarro County TX). 0.326 ac in Block 22, City of Tehuacana (= same 100×137 ft lot from deed [325]; source deed cross-referenced as Vol. 890 Pg. 270 confirming [325] chain). Consideration: $10.00 + $76,000 vendor's lien (Cendant Mortgage Corporation). Subject to "all minerals and royalty reservations and conveyances of record" (boilerplate — no actual reservation by trust; deed [325] conveyed full fee simple including minerals). Grantees' address: P.O. Box 191, Tehuacana TX 76686. Acknowledged Aug 22, 2000 before Benjie Reed NP, Limestone County (comm. exp. 9/26/2000). Attorney: Reed & Reed L.L.P., P.O. Box 1072, Mexia TX 76667. LC Vol. 1040, Pg. 510–512, Inst# 00003589, Doc# 003589. Filed Aug 25, 2000 4:21 PM; recorded Aug 28, 2000 4:00 PM; Sue Lown, County Clerk. NON-PROJECT PROPERTY — completes Dorsett Family Trust real property disposition chain: Genevieve → Trust ([325], 1993) → Tiblier ([329], 2000). **All Dorsett Limestone County real property now fully accounted for**: Block 23 lot sold to Eady ([310], 1959); Block 22 lot conveyed to trust ([325], 1993), then sold by trust to Tiblier ([329], 2000); Boyd Survey sold to Simmons ([318], 1975). Estate had no real property at death ([328], 1999).

Genevieve B. Dorsett Family Trust dated December 14, 1992 (Donald J. Dorsett, Trustee, Brazos County TX) conveys 0.326 ac in Block 22, City of Tehuacana, Limestone County to Cynthia S. Tiblier and husband Bruce V. Tiblier (Navarro County TX). Property: same 100×137 ft lot as deed [325]; source deed cross-referenced as "deed dated February 26, 1993... recorded in Vol. 890, Page 270" (= deed [325]). Consideration: $10.00 + $76,000 promissory note (vendor's lien retained; deed of trust to First American Title Insurance Company, Trustee; payee: Cendant Mortgage Corporation). Subject to easements, ROW, prescriptive rights, "all minerals and royalty reservations and conveyances of record" (boilerplate — no actual reservation by trust). General warranty.
